warning_text:
⚠ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
sender_label: page-replacement (engine block document; tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단')
auth_state: anonymous (Sign in/Sign up shown; composer accepted submit without login wall)
notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE (used GUI; Win32 SetCursorPos+mouse_event for composer click since windows-mcp Click loc-by-coords was rejected as string, clipboard paste of Korean PII verified in composer). LIVE submit: user msg shown, NO assistant answer and NO 'Something went wrong' error — engine swallowed the blocked fetch silently. F5 RELOAD surfaced the page-replacement block '보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Matches known Mistral reload-block pattern. '보안 정책' visible after reload.
